name: Impossible Ham and Asparagus Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Fresh asparagus, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Grease a pie plate that is 10 x 1 1/2 inches.
3. In the prepared pie plate, sprinkle diced ham, 1 cup of shredded cheese, asparagus, and sliced onions evenly over the bottom layer.
4. In a blender or hand beater, mix together milk, eggs, Bisquick, salt, and pepper until smooth for 15 seconds or 1 minute.
5. Pour the mixture into the pie plate.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 40-45 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Sprinkle with an additional 1/2 cup of cheese.
7. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
8. This recipe serves 6-8 portions. For 3-4 servings: Prepare as directed, but use a pie plate that is 8 x 1 1/4 inches and divide the ingredients (except baking mix and eggs) into halves. Use 1/2 cup of baking mix and 2 eggs. Bake for 35-40 minutes.
